title: zanthoxylum sapindoides subsp. domingense
intro: Zanthoxylum sapindoides subsp. domingense, also known as Dominican prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum sapindoides subsp. domingense include its ability to relieve pain and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and other musculoskeletal disorders. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and bark in hot water or using them in tinctures, and are used to create teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
